schema_id: ion.chatgpt_browser_carrier_profile.v1
carrier_id: CHATGPT_BROWSER_CARRIER

level_ceiling_without_connector_proof: L2_FULL_CARRIER_MCP_PARITY_STAGING

  - full_carrier_mcp_parity
  - chatgpt_browser_full_carrier
can_read_bounded_ion_state: true
can_queue_operator_messages: true
can_record_decision_receipts: true
can_submit_task_returns_with_proof: true
can_request_codex_work_packets: true
can_read_project_files_bounded: true

can_edit_files_directly: staged_artifact_roots_only

must_not_claim_steward_relay_persona: true

template_action_proof_gate: kernel.ion_template_action_gate

  - "### TEMPLATE ACTION PROOF"

forbidden_claims:

  - RELAY authority
  - PERSONA authority

  - arbitrary local machine control
